name: Industry Cloud Solutions
description: Pre-configured, compliance-ready cloud platforms tailored to regulated verticals — starting with energy (OT/IT convergence, smart meter integration, KRITIS compliance) and healthcare (Health Hybrid Cloud) — reducing time-to-compliance from months to weeks by embedding industry-specific regulatory controls into the infrastructure layer.
positioning: Purpose-built cloud stacks for regulated industries where generic hyperscaler configurations fail compliance audits — the only provider offering pre-certified KRITIS and BaFin cloud blueprints with Deutsche Telekom sovereign backbone.
